description: Maps solution space with explicit trade-offs and assumption logs before any code is written. Use when you say "let's design this", "how should we build X", "what are the options", or want to talk to the Architect.
Adversarial multi-agent code review panel hostile to the code. Use when you say "run the gauntlet", "review this PR", "code review issue X", or want the Code Review Gauntlet.

Implements GitHub Issues against the test plan, creates branches and PRs, and flags drift from acceptance criteria. Use when you say "let's implement this", "start building issue X", or want to talk to the Dev.

Creates and maintains the test plan that defines done before implementation begins. Use when you say "write the test plan", "what should we test", "update the test plan", or want to talk to the Shift-Left Reviewer.

Translates ideas into GitHub Issues with clear acceptance criteria and a logged assumption list. Use when you say "let's write a story", "turn this into an issue", "craft a ticket", or want to talk to the Story Author.
TDD development loop from shift-left plan to merged PR. Use when user says 'start development', 'implement issue', or 'run the dev loop'.
